feed.title: Discworld 🐢❄️
feed.subtitle: Discworld is a bespoke computational cluster for processing biostructural raw data. Specialities: Cryo-Electron Microscopy, Cryo-Tomography.

entry.title: Dummy update
entry.content: This is a dummy example of a quick update we can provide on changes, service updates, new features.
entry.summary: This is a dummy example of a quick update we can provide on changes, service updates, new features.
